title: Shierumon Realm Modpack [Fabric]
body:
## **Shierumon Realm**
A Cobblemon adventure modpack that expands upon the Official Cobblemon Modpack by integrating select extras for an enriched, dynamic gameplay experience.

**Features:**

- Complete Cobblemon Experience: Enjoy every feature from the Official Cobblemon Modpack—from catching and training Pokémon to immersive battles.
- Dynamic Combat: With Cobblemon Fight or Flight Reborn, experience context-sensitive battles where your Pokémon react by fighting back or retreating.
- In-Game Economy: Use Cobbledollars to trade, purchase upgrades, and progress your journey as a trainer.
- Reactive Audio: Immerse yourself in a dynamic soundtrack with Reactive Music (and its dependency YetAnotherConfigLib), adapting in real-time to your surroundings.
- Visual Enhancements: Benefit from high-quality resource and texture packs—including Jor's Cobblemon Music Pack (Reactive Music), [ETF] Entity Texture Features, and [EMF] Entity Model Features—for a polished and immersive look.
